summary:
MINNESOTA TRAGEDY AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon discusses a recent tragic event involving children in Minnesota, attributing the violence to demonic possession and attempts by the enemy to disrupt an impending move of God. He urgently advises parents to actively engage in spiritual warfare by pleading the blood of Jesus over their children's schools, taking daily communion, and praying in the spirit to establish a protective barrier against fear and mass casualties. Brandon emphasizes the authority of the believer to combat demonic forces that seek to instill paralyzing fear within communities and churches.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF GLOBAL CONFLICT: Brandon shares detailed visions concerning international geopolitical escalations, specifically warning of surprise night attacks on Israel reminiscent of October 7, accelerated warfare involving Gaza, strikes on Damascus, and the mobilization of Turkish soldiers wearing red hats. He also describes a vision of the King of England transforming into a scorpion stretching its pincers over Europe, alongside the demonic entity Apollyon influencing Russian leadership to escalate European conflicts resembling World War II devastation. Furthermore, Brandon outlines a strategic lifeline forming between Russia and Cuba through BRICS alliances, symbolized by a green sprout, intended to challenge Western financial dominance.

NORTH AMERICAN UPHEAVALS AND LEADERSHIP: Brandon recounts a vision of the White House surrounded by a severe storm and stripped trees, where glowing windows represent the crucial need for Donald Trump's leadership in the challenging days ahead. Looking toward Canada, Brandon foresees a period of great darkness and a looming financial depression stemming from recent political choices, alongside a devastating earthquake predicted to strike British Columbia. He emphasizes the importance of electing leaders who yield to the Holy Spirit to successfully navigate these incoming national and regional crises, noting that Emmanuel Macron will act as a forerunner tilling the ground for future prophetic events.

THE GREAT HARVEST AND CHURCH TRANSFORMATION: Brandon relays a divine mandate for a massive global harvest of over five billion souls, emphasizing that God is not returning for a defeated or anemic church. He foresees a transition in the body of Christ where older, prominent ministers pass the baton to a new generation, expressly warning against the poison of nepotism and declaring that God will use ordinary, yielded individuals, drawing on his own past as a janitor. Brandon believes this massive revival will require supernatural financial breakthroughs to fund necessary resources, expanding from localized movements to global awakenings in unexpected places like Hollywood, Hawaii, and Taiwan.

HEALING AND DELIVERANCE: Brandon concludes by declaring physical and spiritual healing over his listeners, specifically targeting conditions like lung damage, asthma, cancer, diabetes, and PTSD, while noting a vision of lungs being supernaturally cleansed from chemical exposure. He also addresses demonic oppression in homes, advising believers to anoint their houses with oil, command spirits to leave, and study deliverance teachings from figures like Lester Sumrall. Finally, Brandon calls for spiritual protection over children against demonic bullying in schools and intercedes for the supernatural comfort of grieving families affected by recent tragedies.
rawData: [August 28, 2025]-[The Lord showed me a storm coming around the White House]-[https://youtu.be/s0WAsL-TZgA]-[Hello everybody. Good morning family. It's afternoon, evening, or good night, whatever one you are, wherever you are in the world right now. Well, I just felt in my heart the Lord told me, He said, "I want you to go on and pray." Father, I just thank You, Lord, for this time of prayer. We invite You in, of course, Father, You're everything to us. We can't do any of this without You. But, Father, I thank You, Lord, that we pray Your heart tonight. And they are pinpoint precise prayers. Father, we're not scattershot, but we hit the target right on. And Father, I thank You, Lord, that You've called us and You've chosen us for such a time as this. It's time, Father, that we rise up, take our authority, and pray. And we thank You, Lord, that You meet us right here and the glory comes. The glory, the glory. Thank You, Lord, for the glory. Thank You, Lord, for all Your presence, the angels that are protecting and watching over us as we do this, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We put a bloodline around this house right now in Jesus' name. And we thank You, Lord, that Your angels are surrounding us and they're bearing us up in their hands, lest we dash our foot against a stone. And we thank You, Lord, for all that You've given us—the authority of the believer to tell the devil he is under our feet in Jesus' mighty name. Well, okay. So, we have a lot of different things we can talk about. I'll try to keep this as short as possible because it's already pretty late here, but I have some things on my heart to talk about. You know, it's interesting. We were interceding for Minnesota. And the devil raises his stinking head out of that molehole and did what he did today. We pray for the people that were affected by this tragic event in Minnesota today with these children. But it shows where there's a glory spot trying to form because the enemy comes immediately to kill, steal, and destroy. He comes to try to silence it. He wants to bring fear, torment, and destruction in everything he does. So, it's Minnesota. Just like what I'm telling you all when we're interceding and the Lord's showing us there's something about to happen. There's a major move of God that we're going to experience on this earth like we've never seen before. But one of the major places that we're praying over is Minnesota. And here we have this event take place today. So, it's tragic. And this is why I told you all as parents to drive around and plead the blood of Jesus over your schools where your children are at. And in the morning when the children get up for school, take communion before you go. Take your authority, read in Ephesians, and go through the book of Ephesians, and take your seat next to Him in the heavenlies. This is important. You say, "Well, we don't have time in the morning." No, you don't have time not to go and take your authority and pray over your children every day. Anoint them with oil. Send your angels. I believe that we have power and authority over all this stuff. And the bottom line is, this young man whoever did this tragic thing was demonically possessed. And so that's why I tell everybody: if you put the bloodline, I believe a thousand shall fall at your side and 10,000 at your right hand, but nothing shall come nigh you. But you have to take your place every day and pray around your kid's school if you're able to drive around it. We drive around the school, drive around and just pray in the spirit. If you know how to pray in the spirit, pray in tongues. Pray in tongues around there. If you don't know what to pray, let the Holy Spirit lead you. And you just go around praying in the spirit around your church. This is what I've told you. The enemy would try to bring fear in the days ahead so that people would not want to come together and assemble together through mass casualties like this. This is what I saw coming. This is what I tried to warn y'all about on another level, about the Second Amendment and things that are attached to this. And that's why the Lord told me, He said, "You must pray because in the days ahead, churches will be a target—not only churches, but major speakers, major ministers that have huge platforms, to cause fear for the revival that's about to come so that people go, 'Well, I don't want to go there.'" And I even told Diana, we were talking about it. That's it. The enemy will try to bring so much confusion and chaos so that the freedoms you take for granted every single day as Americans—where we wake up and don't really have to think about, 'Am I safe to go to Walmart? Am I safe to go to the grocery store?' because we just live in a society that is pretty safe, not like in a third-world country—the Lord was showing me that the enemy would try to instill fear in people so that you don't feel like you have the confidence to go to church, and you're always on edge. But I know that as a believer who knows their authority, you can pray over your community. That's why I drive around a lot. We look at thrift stores or whatever, but you can drive around in your community and pray, and we pray in tongues a lot. Diana and I, we just drive around because we know the power and the authority of the believer to do this. And we drive around in the poor neighborhoods, we drive around the rich neighborhoods, and we just drive. And I just get in and listen to my preaching sermons. And today, most of my day was praying. Most of my day was praying in the spirit, praying over things, and doing my assignments. I was on assignment all day long praying for a megachurch and praying over Israel because I had a word last night. The Lord visited us again, and the anointing was so strong, y'all. And He was showing me surprise attacks coming against Israel in the middle of the night. And He said, "You must pray. There will be surprise attacks." And I'll go into all the things I saw concerning what's coming because it needs to be said. I was praying over Damascus, and then I was told this afternoon, Diana said, "Did you see that Israel struck Damascus?" And this is exactly what we've been praying over. I hadn't had time to make a video, but the Lord showed me an acceleration of war. And He told me this thing was going to try to really kick off, and as they try to take over Gaza and all those things take place, you're going to see an escalation of war. It started getting dark outside because of the storm that I was seeing. I see a major storm coming on America. I am praying over this storm, trying to keep it from happening. But as I was praying, the lights were all on in every window of the White House. And they were glowing with a glow. As I was looking, I could see Niagara Falls, the river that runs through there, going over into Canada. I could see a glow on that river for some reason. All I know is this is what I'm seeing, and I'm praying over this earthquake not to happen over British Columbia. So as I'm seeing all that, the Lord told me, 'What will happen in Canada in the days ahead because of what they decided in their vote, because of what a lot of them decided.' Not saying everybody, because a lot of you would be very upset because you're going, 'I didn't vote that way.' No, the majority. As the majority go this way, I saw a financial depression coming on Canada. And the Lord said, 'The tribulation has not begun, but in certain parts, it will look like it has begun in Canada.' And I know that's a hard word for some folks. It will look like that in some ways because of the trying times some of these people will face, because of the earthquakes, because of this stuff, and I'm just telling you what I saw. But the Lord was showing me the importance of picking leaders, putting leaders into office, putting leaders into positions of authority that will yield to the spirit of the Lord if He's leading them to do that. Not saying that Trump's always perfect, but we're praying for him, and he has a soft heart toward Him. You can feel it. You know God's working on him on things; you can see it. And as you're praying over it, his heart is for America. His heart is for making America great again physically, financially, whatever. You can tell his heart—he doesn't have a second agenda. He really wants to make America great again. He obviously really wants peace. Blessed are the peacemakers. So as I was praying into this, I saw a scorpion rise up in England. This was a head leader in England that turned into a scorpion, and the scorpion's tail started to stretch out over Europe. And I could see him pinching his pincers. This man was pinching his pincers and looking out over Europe. And I thought, 'Well, that's really interesting,' as I was looking in the spirit and the Lord was showing me this. So then I see this happening. Then the Lord shows me the great Apollyon, the great Apollyon, out of the bottom of the pit. I told you before he was spinning like a top and went and was influencing Putin, remember? Well, this time I saw a demonic countenance start coming on his face, and I saw an escalation of war in Europe. As I'm seeing this, I see the past. I was taken to the past, and I see Europe as in World War II, how it looked with the tanks, the German tanks, and all their military equipment going through Europe. But the buildings, you know how they looked in some of the old movies we watch, like 'Saving Private Ryan' or something like that, old war movies. There were blown-up buildings in the background of what I was seeing in this vision, and an escalation of war. But this is what I thought was interesting: as I'm seeing that, I see a line, and it goes into Cuba. In the center of Cuba, there was a new plant of growth. The plant sprung forth, and it had three leaves on it. It looked like a bean sprout that sprung forth. And the Lord said, 'New financial opportunities are going to open themselves for a lifeline to Cuba from Russia in the days ahead.' That's what I heard, and strategic alliances will be attempted to be made for BRICS on a greater scale, dividing the line from the Western culture, the dollar, for BRICS. And I saw this green sprout come up out of the ground, which I believe represented new growth. So I was seeing that, and then I could see again escalation, and the Lord was warning me about praying over all this. This is—I know I say a lot, y'all, but this is what I've been praying over the last couple of days. And the Lord is warning me again about major voices in the body of Christ that you see, prominent ministers who are older, who are going to start to transition home. I saw again certain voices, certain ministries that would start to transition with new faces in their ministries, as the elders would start to pass the baton, like a runner. Did I say this publicly? Some of this? Okay, because some of it, y'all, because it all bleeds together, because all the visions are like a puzzle to what the Lord shows me. They all go together. So when I'm saying it, one piece goes to this, but it's just like to be continued. And then he gives me more as I pray. But as I was telling you all, I saw the baton being brought over this shoulder, and you're in stride running and you grab this and you finish the race. And that's why I told you the Lord said, "I'm saving my best for last. You are my closers." Many of the people that he has assembled here on this channel, you're the closers. This is one of the greatest outpourings we're about to see, one of the greatest moves of the spirit of God this world has ever seen before. And most people go, "Well, I don't know about all that, Brandon. I've heard a lot said about this all my life." I saw a lot of the seeds our ancestors sowed in prayer. They believed, like the pilgrims. Everybody has been praying for a major move of God, wanting a "one nation under God", having revival, doing all these things, and believing for, like, John Wesleys and so on and so on. They have always believed for a major move of God, a harvest of souls. And even when I was in there praying, he told me, "Brandon, I'm not coming back for an anemic church. I'm not coming back for a defeated church. It's not all abandon ship time, like, 'We're getting out of here. It's getting bad. Look at the shootings up there and going crazy. We've got to get out of here, folks. Boy, got to hide your kids, hide your wife, hide your relatives, whatever.' No, it's not about hiding your kids, hiding your wives, hiding your cousins, everybody. It's not about that. It's about taking your authority and rising up with a backbone, like a crowbar, and being the body of Christ that God's called us to be." And that was what the Lord said to me. He said, "Do you see this drive of how many people are born again? This is where my goal is." His goal was way up here. He said, "I don't want that any man should perish, but all come to repentance. Brandon, I don't want anybody to go to hell, but all come to repentance." He said, "Would you want any of your kids to go to hell?" He said, "I'm a good daddy, too, Brandon. I don't want any of my kids to go to hell, either." His heart is after leaving the ninety-nine to go after the one. He said, "I don't want any of my kids to go to hell, Brandon. Neither would you. None of them." If you knew that Braden was going to hell, or PA, whoever, and you were watching it as a father and you're going, "Oh, no, my babies!" And that's why he said, "I want this harvest." And he said, "If you just do your job and walk and take your authority and do what I've commissioned you to do on YouTube and pray, if you all will do this, I'll come back and get you. But I'm coming back for a harvest." And I saw a gauge, like I said, and I said, "Lord, well, how many do you want?" because that's my mind. There's a bunch of them. The tribulation is going to have people in it, right? So I said, "Well, I'm thinking, 'Well, how many do we have to get? What's the harvest number?'" Five billion. Five billion was the number I heard in my spirit—over five billion. I know there's eight billion, but five was like, "Believe big." Five billion folks, five billion people. A radical move of God for a harvest of over five billion. To me, I'm like, "Whoa, okay, let's do it." Nothing's too big for God. If we just believe, if we start plugging away and start doing what we're supposed to do, use our authority, and pray into this thing as raising up a million-person prayer army of men and women, praying and asking the Lord to send the laborers. He said, "For the harvest is plentiful, and the laborers are few." Do you understand? There's a lot of people that just go, "Well, you know, it seems like too much. I like doing my status quo. I like watching my soap opera," or whatever they like to do, "and eat my bonbons and ice cream because I just like my own family time. It's not convenient." That's what I told you. It's not going to be convenient church. And what he also showed me was—what is the word that we looked up today? Nepotism. Nepotism. He says, "It's not about nepotism." You see a lot of ministry with nepotism as the elders, because he's talking about the elders going home. And he said, "Well, it doesn't just fall on the next generation, Brandon. They may go into it knowing, 'I have this name,' but you don't sustain yourself there. It's by refining fire." And he was warning me. He said, "Nepotism is poisonous in ministry." So what I'm trying to tell you is, you don't think you're qualified, and you don't think God can use you, but it's all hands on deck. And just because you may think, "Well, my pastor has a son or a daughter, and it's surely going to go on them, and he's going to use them," but I'm telling you folks, you may think, "Well, I'm not qualified. God can't use me." But if you just have a yielded 'yes' and your heart is right before him, he said it's all hands on deck. And it's not going to be just because of nepotism, like, "Well, they've been in ministry their whole life, and it's been generational." That's baloney. If you just have a heart and you say, "God, here am I. Use me," he'll use you. That's what I'm trying to say. And a lot of times people say, "Well, Brandon, who are you? You're not qualified. Where did you go to Bible school? Where did you go to this?" I went to the school of hard knocks. Let me tell you where I went to school: I went to the school of hard knocks. And I may not be this Bible scholar out there—I know I read the word, I have it playing in my background, and I've had learning disabilities my whole life—but I was just a man who was a janitor that said, "God, here am I. Use me." And he said, "Brandon, go on YouTube, tell people I'm coming." And I said, "Father, I'll do it." And here I am. I'm sitting on a couch in the middle of my bedroom, and I have some lights I got off of Amazon, and I've got my iPhone right here recording me. It doesn't take a studio with multi-million dollar cameras and multi-million dollar lights for you to be used by God. I just got a little iPhone, and I have a green screen behind me with the revival playing so that it looks pretty for you. But I'm here to tell you, if you just say yes to Jesus today, it doesn't matter how much money you think you have. I've got less than a thousand-dollar iPhone that I'm making payments on every single month, but I say, "Jesus, here am I." So I'm trying to tell you, don't think yourself too small that God can't use you, because I was the guy that was just in the bathroom cleaning toilets not even a couple of years ago. And I thought nobody would even look my direction. And now, all of a sudden, I've got people calling me from all around the world saying, "Hey, we want to talk to you." And I'm like, "Where were you a couple of years ago?" I'm still the same guy. I just want to pray and tell everybody that Jesus loves them and he has a plan for their life. Just like I told Diana, I said, "If I had to go back to cleaning bathrooms tomorrow, I'd do it because that's where I died." That's where Brandon found out how to hear the voice of the Lord—at the commode. Listening to him through the hardest times of my life. I never had someone give me a tip of the hat, saying, "Boy, you got what it takes." Most people always said, "You didn't." They didn't believe in me. Nobody did. But I'm telling you, Jesus did. And Jesus believes in you. And if He'll use me, He'll use you. So, if you've got to get a camera out there and put your iPhone up with a little stand on it from Amazon and say, "Hey, here am I. I'm out there. I've got something to say. I want to tell you about Jesus. I'll tell you about my life today," that's what we did. I had a vision, and the more I pray—it's like I told my friend Gina, I said, "I pray, and now I'm driving around and God takes me to the future. I see sometimes five years in advance, and He'll show me things that are coming." He said, "This is what I want you to pray." And I'll be in that scene. I know what's going to happen at that point, a couple of years away. And it's developing more and more as I yield to Him and just say, "Yes, Lord. Here am I. Use me." I'm telling you, it wasn't somebody special with some big degree or somebody huge in ministry saying, "Brandon, I believe in you, boy. You've got what it takes." Not one time. Not one time. I had people prophesy over us, but they all look at you like you're crazy. I see visions and the Lord shows me things, but when they start coming to pass, they go, "There's maybe something to this boy." I said, "Well, I just love Jesus. I just love Jesus." And as far as having a huge platform of everybody wanting to say that, the fakers come out wanting to be your friend now. And then you go, "Come on, man. I can see through that. I can see through that." But I want to tell you, Jesus saw it the whole time. And you don't need anybody to tip their hat to you and say, "You can do it." All you need to do is say, "Jesus, here am I. Use me." It's all hands on deck right now, is what I'm trying to tell you. You may be in the back of a nursery room helping out with the children's church. You may be the guy that's picking the weeds in the flower bed at the church. I was both: going in there, cleaning the diapers up, doing it all, vomit spills. Did it for years—15 years of my life. Cleaned up poo all over the floor, elderly losing their bowels, walking in there and cleaning up, and you have so much it would gag a maggot. That's how bad it was. You would throw up all over the place, and I'd be gagging trying to clean up people's waste. But I'd just say, "God, here am I. Mold me. You can use me. If You can use this man, I'll do something for You." So I just have this on my heart to tell you when I hear the Lord tell me, "Brandon, I'll come back. I want the souls. I'm waiting. I want Asia. I'm calling out for Asia." But nothing happens in the natural until it's birthed out of the supernatural in prayer. Nothing. Everything is always birthed out of prayer. And so we must pray. I've talked too much today again, but I don't know, maybe that blessed you, maybe it didn't, but I just thought I should tell you. I just have a heart after people and I see them so broken every single day. When you're driving around, you see the homeless and they're tweaking out on drugs, and you just look at it and you go, "Man, there's a better way. God has so much more for you. He loves you and He has a plan for your life." Do you understand? There are so many people who have been so religiously brainwashed that we don't realize how much Jesus Christ truly loves us and He has a plan for our lives. But religion, the Pharisees always try to tell you you're not good enough: "Well, you have sin in your life. He can't use you." You know, we live upright and we try to live holy as He is holy. But when we fall down and skin our knee, we pick ourselves back up. God is always there and ever-present. He's an ever-present help in a time of need. And He has His hands ready to wrap around us like the prodigal son saying, "Hey, you got this. You can do this." But most people always try to disqualify you the moment they see you: "Well, he talks too much. Well, he looks a certain way. He's too overweight. He's this. He's that." You say, "No, God looks at the heart." David was the one picked last. All the other sons were picked first, and they were looking at them going, "Man, they've got what it takes." And the prophet said, "Nope, not him. Not him. Not him. Not him. Do you have anybody else?" "Well, we do, but he's on the backside over there and he's tending the sheep. We're not too proud of him. He's the one that everybody kind of looks down on. He's kind of weird. He plays his harp. He's kind of different, you know." And he goes, "Bring him to me." He goes over there, looks at him, and goes, "You're the one. You're the one playing the harp, taking care of the sheep that smell like sheep poop." That's the one that God uses. So I'm just trying to encourage you. Don't get down on yourself. I'm trying to say all that to say: just keep on keeping on. You've got what it takes. And God chose you for such a time as this. In these last days, it's all hands on deck. So I pray that that blesses you. Let's pray together. I don't want to sit here and ramble, but I just felt it was good to say it. "Father, I just thank You, Lord, for Your body that was broken for us." We never enter into prayer on this channel without taking communion first. Period. It's just part of it. We cover ourselves in the blood. And if the Lord wants to show us something, then He does. If He doesn't, then that's fine. But we always cover and we pray over our nation, we'll pray over whatever prayer request. But I want you to believe big today. Nothing's too big and nothing's too small. Jesus Christ paid the price for it all. And it's time for us to be believing believers that don't have doubt in us, that say, "Hey, I believe God can do it today." Stop believing for tomorrow—always believing for tomorrow and the next day and the next day. Believe for your now. When I'm sitting there and I'm praying for my daughter Megan—you know, because Megan is overcoming special needs and she's getting better every day—He always says to me when I'm praying in the church, "Braden, why not now? Stop always thinking for tomorrow. Why not believe for now? The right now. Faith calls those things that be not as though they were right now. Speak to your mountain right now." So I'm trying to tell you, as we take communion, believe for your circumstance. You know, you go, "Well, Brandon, I've had this for so many years. My marriage has been bad for so many years. My kids have been strung out on drugs. You know what? I believe someday the Lord's going to do this. Why not today? Why not right now?" So, as we believe today, as we take our communion right now, believe for your expiration date.
